ChatLog.title: ChatLog
ChatLog.description: A record of a conversation turn between a user and the virtual assistant.

sessionId.description: A unique identifier for the user's session.

userMessage.description: The message sent by the user.

botResponse.description: The response generated by the virtual assistant.

timestamp.description: The time the message was recorded.

chat_logs/{logId}.description: Stores the conversation history for the virtual assistant.
